title: 第3周 第5天 — 税费与扣款（Tax, Withholding & Set-off）
objective: 掌握商务合同中税费条款与扣款条款的核心词汇，重点理解 withholding tax（预扣税）和 gross-up（总额化补偿）的法律机制，以及 set-off（抵销）与 deduction（扣款）在合同中的精确含义，能够准确翻译税费和扣款相关条款。

blocks.html: 上节回顾：上节课学习了利息与违约金核心词汇——interest（利息）、per annum（每年）、accrue（累积产生）、liquidated damages（预定损害赔偿）、grace period（宽限期）、without prejudice to（不影响……权利）等。今天我们继续第3周支付条款，学习与税费和扣款相关的核心术语。

错题持续攻克（来自 mistakes.md）：
  • operative provisions = 实质条款（❌ 错误：“执行条款”）
  • in full force and effect = 完全有效（⚠️ 固定搭配，必须完整翻译，不能简化为“有效”）
  • held to be = 被裁定为（❌ 错误：“被认为是”——legal hold = 裁定）
  • unenforceable = 不可执行的（❌ 错误：“没有强制执行力的”——表达冗长）
  • attached hereto = 附于本协议的（⚠️ here- 家族词不可省略不可简化）
税费与扣款条款在跨境服务合同、采购合同中极为常见，以下 16 个术语是翻译此类条款的核心。

rows: all applicable taxes; tax imposed by; taxes and duties
subject to withholding tax; withholding tax at the rate of; deduct withholding tax
n./v. 总额化（补偿）；税后净额补足义务
gross-up obligation; gross up the payment; gross-up clause
exclusive of VAT; plus VAT; VAT invoice; VAT-registered
n. 关税；税（特指进出口关税）
customs duty; import duty; export duty; duties and taxes
without deduction; deduction from the payment; any deduction required by law
n. 抵销；（以债权）相互抵销
right of set-off; set-off against; waive the right of set-off; no set-off or counterclaim
phr. 税后净额；扣除税款后的金额
paid net of tax; amount net of withholding tax; net of all deductions
relevant tax authority; remit to the tax authority; as required by the tax authority
n. 适用税款；应缴税款
all applicable taxes; pay all applicable taxes; applicable taxes and levies
remit to the tax authority; remit the tax withheld; remit payment
v./n. 征收（税款）；税捐；课税
levy a tax; taxes and levies; levy imposed by government; any levy or surcharge
without set-off or counterclaim; assert a counterclaim; counterclaim against
n. 总金额；税前金额；未扣款前金额
gross amount of the invoice; on a gross basis; gross amount before deduction
n. 净金额；税后实得金额；扣款后金额
net amount received; net amount payable; on a net basis
adj. 免税的；豁免税款的
tax-exempt entity; tax-exempt status; income is tax-exempt

blocks.html: 词源记忆：gross 来自拉丁语 grossus（大、厚重），法律语境中指“税前总额”；net 则来自法语 net（干净、纯粹），指扣除所有款项后的“净额”。“gross-up”字面意思就是“使其变大”——把收到的税后净额反推回税前总额，让对方实际到手不减少。

rows: free and clear of all taxes
不含任何税款；税后净付

rows.en: All payments shall be made free and clear of all taxes.
rows.zh: 所有付款均应在扣除一切税费前全额支付。

rows: without any deduction or withholding

rows.en: Payments shall be made without any deduction or withholding on account of tax.
rows.zh: 付款不得因税款而作任何扣减或代扣代缴。

rows: gross up the payment
将付款总额化（补足税款缺口）

rows.en: The Payor shall gross up the payment so that the Recipient receives the full amount.
rows.zh: 付款方应对款项进行毛额化处理，以确保收款方收到全额款项。

rows: exclusive of VAT

rows.en: The price of USD 50,000 is exclusive of VAT and any applicable duties.
rows.zh: 50,000 美元的价款不含增值税及任何适用的关税。

rows.en: Each party hereby waives any right of set-off or counterclaim against the other.
rows.zh: 各方特此放弃对另一方行使任何抵销或反诉的权利。

rows: remit to the relevant tax authority

rows.en: The Payor shall remit the withheld amount to the relevant tax authority within the required timeframe.
rows.zh: 付款方应在规定时限内将代扣款项汇交有关税务机关。

rows: subject to withholding tax
须缴纳预扣税的；受预扣税约束的

rows.en: Payments under this Agreement may be subject to withholding tax under applicable law.
rows.zh: 本协议项下的付款可能依据适用法律受预提税约束。

rows: taxes and duties

rows.en: The Buyer shall bear all taxes and duties arising from the importation of the Goods.
rows.zh: 买方应承担因货物进口而产生的所有税费和关税。

blocks.text: 3a. withholding tax vs. VAT vs. duty

rows: withholding tax
所得税性质，支付时由付款方代扣
付款方代扣，汇缴税务局
跨境服务费、版税、股息支付
流转税，每个环节增值部分缴税

blocks.html:
• deduction（扣款）：单方面从应付款中扣除某金额，通常有合同授权或法律要求（如扣缴税款）。范围广，可以是税款、质保金、损失赔偿等。
  • set-off（抵销）：用己方对对方享有的债权，抵消己方对对方的债务。双方均有独立债权，互相折抵。需主动行使，属于权利，可被合同明文排除。
  • counterclaim（反诉/反索赔）：在诉讼或仲裁程序中提出的对对方的索赔请求，与原诉请求并行审理。

合同常见表述：“All payments shall be made in full without any right of set-off, deduction, or counterclaim.”——意思是：付款方不得以任何理由少付（不得抵销、不得扣款、不得反诉减额）。

问题场景：A公司（甲国）向B公司（乙国）支付100万元服务费。乙国法律规定，跨境服务费须预扣10%的预扣税。

没有 gross-up 条款时：A扣除10万元税款，B实际收到90万元，合同价值缩水。

有 gross-up 条款时：A须向B支付“足额”——即B税后净得不低于100万元。因此A需支付约111.11万元（100÷0.9），扣除约11.11万元税款后，B实收100万元。

合同语言：“If any withholding tax is required by law, the Payor shall gross up the payment such that the net amount received by the Payee, after deduction of such withholding tax, equals the full amount that would have been received in the absence of such withholding.”

items.title: 例句 1
items.sentence: All sums payable by the Payor to the Payee under this Agreement shall be paid free and clear of, and without any deduction or withholding on account of, any Tax, unless the Payor is required by applicable law to make such deduction or withholding.
structure: All sums payable by the Payor to the Payee — 主语：付款方应付给收款方的所有款项
shall be paid free and clear of, and without any deduction or withholding on account of, any Tax — 谓语：应不含任何税款地足额支付（free and clear of = 不含；on account of = 因……原因）
unless the Payor is required by applicable law to make such deduction or withholding — 例外条件：除非适用法律要求付款方进行扣除或扣缴
items.translation: 付款方依据本协议向收款方应付的所有款项，均应不含任何税款、不作任何扣除或扣缴地足额支付，但适用法律要求付款方进行上述扣除或扣缴的除外。

items.title: 例句 2
items.sentence: If the Payor is so required to make any such deduction or withholding, the Payor shall simultaneously pay to the Payee such additional amounts as are necessary to ensure that the net amount received by the Payee after such deduction or withholding equals the full amount that the Payee would have received had no such deduction or withholding been required.
structure: If the Payor is so required to make any such deduction or withholding — 条件从句：如果付款方被要求进行此类扣除或扣缴
the Payor shall simultaneously pay to the Payee such additional amounts as are necessary — 主句：付款方应同时向收款方支付必要的额外金额（gross-up义务）

to ensure that the net amount received ... equals the full amount that the Payee would have received had no such deduction or withholding been required — 目的状语：以确保扣缴后净收额等于无需扣缴时的全额（had...been = 虚拟语气，省略if的倒装）
items.translation: 若付款方被要求进行上述扣除或扣缴，付款方应同时向收款方支付必要的额外金额，以确保收款方在扣除或扣缴后实际收到的净额，等于在无需进行该等扣除或扣缴情况下收款方本应收到的全部金额。

items.title: 例句 3
items.sentence: Each Party shall be responsible for all taxes imposed on or measured by its income or profits, and each Party hereby waives, and shall not be entitled to exercise, any right of set-off or counterclaim in respect of any payment due and payable under this Agreement.
structure: Each Party shall be responsible for all taxes imposed on or measured by its income or profits — 各方就其收入或利润所得之税款自行承担（imposed on = 对…征收；measured by = 按…计算）
each Party hereby waives — hereby = 在此（此处 = 本合同中），正式法律用语
shall not be entitled to exercise, any right of set-off or counterclaim — 不得行使抵销权或反索赔权（be entitled to = 有权……）
in respect of any payment due and payable under this Agreement — 就本协议项下任何到期应付款项（in respect of = 关于；due and payable = 到期应付）
items.translation: 各方应自行承担对其收入或利润征收或按其计算的所有税款，且各方特此放弃并不得行使就本协议项下任何到期应付款项的抵销权或反索赔权。

blocks.html: 看到英文术语，想一想中文意思，然后点击展开答案：

withholding tax
预扣税；扣缴税款
由付款方代扣、代缴税务局的税款
gross-up
总额化；税后净额补足
确保收款方税后实收不低于合同金额
VAT
增值税（Value Added Tax）
exclusive of VAT = 不含增值税
set-off
抵销（权）
用己方债权抵消对对方的债务
duty
关税；税（进出口）
customs duty / import duty / export duty
remit
（向税务局）缴纳；汇款
remit to the relevant tax authority
levy
征收（税款）；税捐
taxes and levies imposed by the government
tax-exempt
免税的
tax-exempt status / tax-exempt entity

sections.heading: 5b. 配对选择：看中文选英文

groups.title: 5b. 配对选择：看中文选英文

questions.prompt: 1. 预扣税（付款方代扣代缴）
options: withholding tax
questions.answer: withholding tax
questions.explanation: withholding tax = 预扣税，由付款方代扣后汇缴税务机关

questions.prompt: 2. 总额化（确保收款方税后实收不减少）
questions.explanation: gross-up = 总额化补偿，确保收款方税后净收等于合同约定金额

questions.prompt: 3. 抵销（用己方债权折抵对方应付款）
questions.explanation: set-off = 抵销，用己方对对方的债权抵消对对方的付款义务

questions.prompt: 4. 关税（进出口税）
questions.explanation: duty = 关税，通常指进出口关税，如 customs duty / import duty

questions.prompt: 5. 向税务机关缴纳（汇缴税款）
questions.explanation: remit = 向税务机关缴纳、汇款；remit to the relevant tax authority 是固定搭配

groups.title: 练习A：术语理解选择
groups.instruction: 根据语境选择最准确的术语。

questions.prompt: 1. 合同写道“The fee is USD 10,000 ____”，意思是价格不含增值税，买方须另付增值税。
options: net of tax（税后净额）
questions.explanation: exclusive of VAT = 不含增值税，价格为税前价，买方需另付VAT

questions.prompt: 2. 中国公司向美国公司支付技术服务费，中国税法要求中国公司从中扣留10%上缴税务局，这10%叫做：
options: withholding tax
questions.answer: withholding tax
questions.explanation: withholding tax = 预扣税，境外服务费常见，付款方扣留一部分税款代缴税务局

questions.prompt: 3. 合同约定服务费100万，但须扣缴10%预扣税，为使乙方税后实得仍为100万，甲方须：
questions.explanation: gross-up = 总额化，即付款方须多支付，使收款方税后净收仍等于合同约定金额

questions.prompt: 4. 合同写道“payments shall be made in full without any right of ____”，意思是付款方不得以任何理由少付或折抵。
questions.explanation: set-off = 抵销权，允许一方用对对方的债权抵消对对方的债务；no set-off = 禁止行使抵销权

questions.prompt: 5. 付款方扣留的预扣税，须在规定期限内 ____ to the relevant tax authority。
questions.explanation: remit = 缴纳、汇缴；remit to the tax authority = 向税务机关缴纳

questions.prompt: 6. 政府对商品交易征收税款，这个动词用：
questions.explanation: levy = 征收（tax）；由政府对纳税人征收；与 impose 近义

groups.title: 练习B：句子填空
groups.instruction: 选择最合适的词填入空白处。

questions.prompt: 1. All payments hereunder shall be made ____ all taxes, duties and levies.
options: subject to
questions.explanation: free and clear of = 不含……，常与 taxes 搭配，表示付款不含任何税费

questions.prompt: 2. The Licensee shall pay all royalties ____ on account of any tax.
options: net of tax
subject to withholding tax
questions.explanation: without any deduction or withholding = 不作任何扣除或扣缴，是合同中要求足额付款的标准表述

questions.prompt: 3. The ____ requires the Payor to top up the payment to compensate for any withholding tax deducted.
questions.explanation: gross-up obligation = 总额化义务，指合同中规定的若扣缴预扣税则须补足金额的义务

questions.prompt: 4. The Buyer shall bear all ____ arising from the import of the Goods into the country of delivery.
questions.explanation: taxes and duties = 税款与关税，是合同中常见的并列搭配，duty特指关税

questions.prompt: 5. Each Party hereby ____ or counterclaim against the other Party in respect of any sums due hereunder.
questions.explanation: waives any right of set-off = 放弃任何抵销权；waive = 放弃（权利）

groups.title: 练习C：错题攻克——here- 家族词与固定搭配

questions.prompt: 1. “the Exhibits attached hereto” 的正确翻译是：
options: 附于本协议的（展附文件）
questions.answer: 附于本协议的（展附文件）
questions.explanation: attached hereto = 附于本协议的；hereto = to this Agreement，here- 家族词必须保留，不得省略

questions.prompt: 2. “remain in full force and effect” 的正确翻译是：
options: 完全有效（保持完全有效）
questions.answer: 完全有效（保持完全有效）
questions.explanation: in full force and effect = 完全有效，是法律固定搭配，不能简化为“有效”，三个词缺一不可

questions.prompt: 3. “if any provision is held to be unenforceable” 中 “held to be” 的正确翻译：
options: 被认为是（日常用语，不够准确）
被裁定为（法律裁定，正确）
questions.answer: 被裁定为（法律裁定，正确）
questions.explanation: held to be = 被裁定为/被判定为，法律语境中 hold 是法院“裁定”的意思，不同于日常的“认为”

questions.prompt: 4. “operative provisions” 的正确翻译：
options: 执行条款（❌ 常见错误）
questions.explanation: operative provisions = 实质条款/正文条款，operative = 实质性的、起作用的，不是“执行”的意思

questions.prompt: 5. “unenforceable” 最规范的中文翻译是：
options: 没有强制执行力的（冗长）
不可执行的（✓ 简洁规范）
无效的（void 的翻译，混淆）
questions.answer: 不可执行的（✓ 简洁规范）
questions.explanation: unenforceable = 不可执行的，简洁表达即可，不必说“没有强制执行力的”

groups.title: 练习D：找出不同类
groups.instruction: 下列四个选项中，有一个与其他三个不属于同一类别，请找出来。

questions.prompt: 1. 找出不属于“税种”的一项：
options: withholding tax（预扣税）
questions.explanation: VAT、withholding tax、import duty 都是税种；set-off 是法律权利（抵销权），不是税种

questions.prompt: 2. 找出不属于“扣减行为”的一项：
options: gross amount（总金额）
questions.answer: gross amount（总金额）
questions.explanation: deduction、withholding、set-off 都涉及“减少/扣除”金额的概念；gross amount = 总金额（税前），是金额概念，不是扣减行为

questions.prompt: 3. 找出不属于“合同主体/机构”的一项：
options: tax authority（税务机关）
questions.explanation: tax authority、Payor、Payee 都是合同中的主体（人/机构）；levy 是动词/名词（征收/税捐），不是合同主体

groups.title: 翻译练习一：英译中
groups.instruction: 将以下条款翻译为中文，完成后点击“提交 AI 批改”获取详细批改。

questions.source: All payments made by the Payor to the Payee under this Agreement shall be made without any deduction or withholding on account of any Taxes, unless the Payor is required by applicable law to deduct or withhold such Taxes.
questions.reference: 付款方依据本协议向收款方支付的所有款项，均应不作任何税款扣除或扣缴，但适用法律要求付款方扣除或扣缴该等税款的除外。

rubric.note: deduction 和 withholding 须分别翻译，不可合并为“不扣款”

rubric.ideal: 因税款原因/就任何税款
rubric.note: on account of = 因……原因，不是“关于”
applicable law 是法律术语固定译法，“适用法律”最为规范

rubric.en: required by applicable law to deduct or withhold
rubric.ideal: 适用法律要求扣除或扣缴
rubric.note: 须分辨 deduct 和 withhold 的区别：deduct 一般指合同内扣款，withhold 特指代扣税款
法律合同中 unless 常译为“……的除外”，形成但书条款

questions.source: If the Payor is required to withhold any Taxes, the Payor shall gross up the payment so that the Payee receives an amount equal to the sum it would have received had no such withholding been made.
questions.reference: 若付款方须扣缴任何税款，付款方应对付款进行总额化处理，使收款方收到的金额等于未经任何扣缴时本应收到的金额。

rubric.note: withhold = 代扣（预扣税），不是“扣留”

rubric.ideal: 对付款进行总额化处理
rubric.note: gross up 是专业术语，须译出“总额化”的含义

rubric.en: an amount equal to the sum
rubric.note: the sum it would have received 是虚拟语气从句，须翻译出“本应收到”

rubric.en: had no such withholding been made
rubric.ideal: 未经任何扣缴时本应收到的
accept: 假如没有进行该等扣缴
rubric.note: had...been made 是省略if的虚拟语气倒装，须体现“假设”语气

groups.title: 翻译练习二：中译英
groups.instruction: 将以下中文条款翻译为英文合同用语，完成后点击“提交 AI 批改”获取详细批改。

questions.source: 买方应承担因进口货物产生的所有关税及适用税款，卖方报价不含增值税及任何政府税捐。
questions.reference: The Buyer shall bear all customs duties and applicable taxes arising from the importation of the Goods, and the Seller's quoted price is exclusive of VAT and any governmental levies.

rubric.en: bear all customs duties and applicable taxes
rubric.ideal: 承担所有关税及适用税款
accept: 负担所有关税和适用税款
rubric.note: bear = 承担，这里是买方负担义务；customs duties = 关税（进出口）
arising from = 因……产生，法律合同常用表达
exclusive of = 不含，注意不要与 inclusive of（含……）混淆
levy = 税捐/征收款，governmental levies 指政府依法征收的各类费用

blocks.html:
常见错误预防：
  • gross-up ≠ 增加付款：gross-up 是“总额化”机制，目的是补偿被扣缴的税款，使收款方税后实得不低于合同金额，不是随意增加付款。
  • set-off ≠ 抵扣：“抵扣”在税法中有特定含义（如进项税额抵扣），合同中的 set-off 应译为“抵销”，指债务互相折抵。
  • exclusive of VAT ≠ 不含税价：exclusive of VAT 特指不含增值税，若要说不含任何税应写 exclusive of all taxes and duties。
  • duty 在不同语境含义不同：作为“关税”时是名词（customs duty）；作为“义务/职责”时也是 duty（如 fiduciary duty 受信义务）。注意区分语境。

sections.heading: 8. 今日小结
sections.html:
第3周 第5天 — 税费与扣款核心要点

知识点核心内容
税种区分withholding tax（预扣税，代扣代缴）vs. VAT（增值税，销售方申报）vs. duty（关税，进出口）
gross-up 机制若须扣缴预扣税，付款方须“总额化”支付，确保收款方税后净收等于合同约定金额
set-off 与 deductionset-off = 债权相互抵销（需有独立债权）；deduction = 从应付款中单方扣减（有合同依据或法律要求）
足额付款条款free and clear of all taxes / without any deduction or withholding = 不含税、足额付款的标准表述
remit vs. levyremit = 缴纳/汇缴（纳税人向税务局）；levy = 征收（政府对纳税人）
错题巩固operative provisions（实质条款）/ in full force and effect（完全有效）/ attached hereto（附于本协议的）/ held to be（被裁定为）

明日预告（第3周 第6天）：货币与汇率条款——currency（货币）、exchange rate（汇率）、denomination（计价货币）、foreign exchange risk（汇率风险）、conversion（货币换算）等核心术语。
